chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-100 of 2021. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For orders on M.A.No.5458/2021(E/A). 03. For hearing of main case. 21.02.2022 Mr. Surhendar Kumar Gemnani, Advocate for the appellant. = * = * = * = * = * = Heard. The acquittal of the private respondents has been impugned by the appellant by way of filing the instant criminal acquittal appeal, it is barred by time by 27 days and no application for condonation of such delay is filed. Consequently, the instant criminal acquittal appeal being time barred is dismissed accordingly together with listed application. JUDG
